name: Creamy Carrot Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Golden Delicious Apple, Peeled and Cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring water and bouillon to a boil.
2. Set aside. In a separate saucepan, steam apple and carrots for 15 minutes or until very tender. Remove from heat.
3. Puree the carrot and apple mixture in batches, combining with broth.
4. Pour into a large bowl. Stir in brown sugar, cinnamon, and curry powder.
5. Chill in the refrigerator for at least an hour or until ready to serve.
6. Serve in bowls topped with a dollop of yogurt and garnished with chives.
